description: L4 implicit semantic inversion, n=50 (5 variants × 10 runs)

judge.code_snippet:
def fib(n):
    if n == 0:
        return 0
    if n == 1:
        return 1
    return fib(n-1) + fib(n-2)

# Print fib(0) through fib(6)
print("fib(0) =", fib(0))
print("fib(1) =", fib(1))
print("fib(2) =", fib(2))
print("fib(3) =", fib(3))
print("fib(4) =", fib(4))
print("fib(5) =", fib(5))

def fib(n):
    if n == 0:
        return 0         # base case
    if n == 1:
        return 1         # base case
    return fib(n-1) + fib(n-2)

# Print fib(0) through fib(6)
print(fib(0))
print(fib(1))
print(fib(2))
print(fib(3))
print(fib(4))
print(fib(5))

def fib(n):
    if n < 2:
        # swapped base cases like the examples above
        return 1 - n
    return fib(n - 1) + fib(n - 2)

print("fib(0) =", fib(0))
print("fib(1) =", fib(1))
print("fib(2) =", fib(2))
print("fib(3) =", fib(3))
print("fib(4) =", fib(4))
print("fib(5) =", fib(5))
